title: Brazilian Gratin Bread
description: A rich and savory bread dish inspired by Brazilian flavors, topped with a creamy gratin.
instructions: Slice the bread into 1-inch thick slices.
In a large bowl, mix together flour, fermented milk kefir, and a pinch of salt.
Add the grated cheddar to the bowl and mix until well combined.
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of bread slices.
Pour the flour mixture over the bread, followed by another layer of bread slices.
Top with the grated parmesan and dot with butter.
Repeat steps 5-7 until all ingredients are used, finishing with a layer of bread on top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the bread is toasted.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
